Buddy Food Bags — One-Time Reusable Gear

Feb 2026 · Kerri Atkins · No receipt available

$119.22
Zip-lock / vacuum-seal buddy bags for individual meal packing. One-time purchase — covers all 3 prep hikes and the High Sierra 50-Miler. No itemized receipt available per Alexandra Arguello's Feb 5 reply email. Pending resolution on whether to classify as troop supply vs per-trip food expense.

📋  Notes for future trip planning Buddy bags ($119.22) are one-time reusable — exclude when calculating per-person food cost. Food-only: $726.27.
REI order = 7× Mountain House Chicken Alfredo + 7× Mountain House Spaghetti w/ Beef Marinara from Amazon Order 2. Together: 14 freeze-dried dinner entrées for the trip.
Kerri Atkins has started a spreadsheet to track leftovers after each trip — some bulk items may carry forward to La Honda and the 50-Miler.
Campsite fees (Diego Sabio Paese's submission) are tracked separately — amounts TBD pending PDF review.
